decisions.decision: Per-instance lego USDs over Cloner replicate_physics
decisions.rationale: Cloner solved PhysX side but left ROS2PublishTransformTree publishing duplicate child_frame_ids (it then disambiguated with ugly path-prefixed names like World_Objects_red_2x3_1_red_2x3 - unusable by name-based recording loop). Per-instance USDs give truly unique inner prims, restore legacy {name}/{name} convention, PhysX is happy.

decisions.decision: Cup cluster_offset applied BEFORE _to_world via _apply_cup_cluster_offset helper
decisions.rationale: randomize_cups validates positions in robot-relative space against lego/robot AABBs. Post-_to_world offset would let validation pass on positions that overlap legos after the cluster shifts. Pre-_to_world keeps validation honest.

After multi-instance Cloner attempt, the legacy convention silently produced empty target lists, killing the publisher. Structural fallback (find first child with UsdPhysics.RigidBodyAPI) handles both single-instance and multi-instance assets.

decisions.decision: ArUco IDs: red=3, green=2, blue=1 (not red=0/green=1/blue=2)
decisions.rationale: User's chosen convention. Drop wrappers auto-rename to drop_1/2/3 via /World/Containers/drop_{aruco_id}. Mirrored in vla_SO-ARM101 control_gui (DROP_ID_LABELS, REAL_COLOR_TO_CUP, etc.) and aruco_camera_localizer config + MARKER_SIZE.

decisions.decision: Workspace ground tile = visual-only mesh quad over collision-only main plane
decisions.rationale: Two-layer split: main /World/defaultGroundPlane keeps neutral gray + collision; small /World/workspace_ground UsdGeom.Mesh on top in pick-place area is matte black for camera contrast. Objects outside workspace area still rest on floor.

decisions.decision: CUP_LAYOUT_REAL_WORLD as separate constant from CUP_LAYOUT_DEFAULTS
decisions.rationale: Two distinct intents: 'reset to factory baseline' (DEFAULTS) vs 'snap to physical-rig calibration' (REAL_WORLD). Match Real World button is a partial override (only offset+gap), preserves user's mode/radius/angle/color_order choices.

decisions.decision: Match Real World auto-called BEFORE add_cups in quick_start
decisions.rationale: Cups don't exist yet - calling before ensures CUP_LAYOUT has calibrated values when add_cups reads it. reposition=True (default) is for in-session re-application via the button.

next_action: Port Lighting Preset panel from ur5e-dt: copy the Lighting Preset sub-panel UI (extension.py:721-732 in ur5e-dt) + _apply_lighting_preset / _clear_all_lights / _ensure_lights_scope methods (extension.py:1114-1230 in ur5e-dt) into soarm101-dt. Skip the manual sliders / HDRI environments / ground swap sub-panels (defer). Add a single CollapsableFrame near the existing 'Workspace Ground' panel. After porting, user picks a preset in-session, then bake it as default in load_scene.

Five new commits on so-arm101 add: 1-episode loop + 6 legos via per-instance USDs (771e564), black ground + matte plastic materials (61bc74a), ArUco resize/reposition/ID remap (a3bd4aa), per-instance USD generator + structural body lookup (c03cdf0), workspace ground tile + cup cluster offset + Match Real World (7c29922). Three commits on vla_SO-ARM101 main (1f4d25a, 7da74d8, 4f06008) mirror the cross-repo changes. One commit on aruco_camera_localizer robosort (4ea203b) mirrors marker geometry + ID remap. Context budget at 78% when paused. Next session: small port of Lighting Preset panel from ur5e-dt - design surveyed but no code copied yet. Then Task 13 (motion duration_s tuning). Plus Tasks 15-20 from original Phase 10.2 plan still standing.
